title: Global OMEGA Certification Protocol
requirements: Final Validation: Run the absolute '/audit' suite across all 327 library nodes.
Shard Integrity: Verify Merkle-root consistency for every distributed shard.
Cryptographic Signing: Issue industrial-grade certificates signed by the Root Authority.
Compliance: Adherence to Law 151 and MENA-Soil architectural standards.

logic.auditing: Execute global structural and performance audits (100/100 threshold).
logic.signing: Generate JWT-based OMEGA Certificates with immutable audit hashes.

compliance.transparency: Publicly verifiable audit logs for every certified shard.
compliance.sovereignty: Final verification of regional data isolation nodes.
